steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The correct equation must match the scatterplot's line of best fit. Read two features from the graph: the sign of the slope (does it rise or fall left to right?) and whether the $y$-intercept is above or below zero.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $y = 0.6 + 1.5x$: positive slope, positive intercept. ✓
  • Choice B — $y = 0.6 - 1.5x$: negative slope — line would fall left to right. ✗
  • Choice C — $y = -0.6 + 1.5x$: positive slope but negative intercept — crosses $y$-axis below zero. ✗
  • Choice D — $y = -0.6 - 1.5x$: both signs wrong. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
